title: lithocarpus conocarpus subsp. euconocarpus
intro: Lithocarpus conocarpus subsp. euconocarpus, also known as the Lithocarpus conocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus conocarpus subsp. euconcarpus include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus conocarpus subsp. euconocarpus typically involve the leaves and bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
